'''dafate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:piggily|piggily]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-f-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:piggily|piggily]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| dafate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:dafate|dafate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:dafatesher|dafatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dafatesherĂ«m|dafatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dafatero|dafatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:dafateshĂ«|dafateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dafateshĂ«m|dafateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidafatero|gokidafatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokidafateshĂ«|gokidafateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidafateshĂ«m|gokidafateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:godafankerom|godafankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godafankeshĂ«|godafankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godafankeshĂ«m|godafankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:godafankeya|godafankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dafaterom|dafaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dafatemu|dafatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:dafateya|dafateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidafaterom|gokidafaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidafatemu|gokidafatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokidafateya|gokidafateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:dafafate|dafafate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:dafafatesher|dafafatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dafafatesherĂ«m|dafafatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dafafatero|dafafatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:dafafateshĂ«|dafafateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dafafateshĂ«m|dafafateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidafafatero|gokidafafatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokidafafateshĂ«|gokidafafateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidafafateshĂ«m|gokidafafateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:godafafankerom|godafafankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godafafankeshĂ«|godafafankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godafafankeshĂ«m|godafafankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:godafafankeya|godafafankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dafafaterom|dafafaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dafafatemu|dafafatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:dafafateya|dafafateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidafafaterom|gokidafafaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidafafatemu|gokidafafatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokidafafateya|gokidafafateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:dĂŠfĂŠte|dĂŠfĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:dĂŠfĂŠtesher|dĂŠfĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dĂŠfĂŠtesherĂ«m|dĂŠfĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dĂŠfĂŠtero|dĂŠfĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:dĂŠfĂŠteshĂ«|dĂŠfĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dĂŠfĂŠteshĂ«m|dĂŠfĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidĂŠfĂŠtero|gokidĂŠfĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokidĂŠfĂŠteshĂ«|gokidĂŠfĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidĂŠfĂŠteshĂ«m|gokidĂŠfĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:godĂŠfĂŠnkerom|godĂŠfĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godĂŠfĂŠnkeshĂ«|godĂŠfĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godĂŠfĂŠnkeshĂ«m|godĂŠfĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:godĂŠfĂŠnkeya|godĂŠfĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dĂŠfĂŠterom|dĂŠfĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dĂŠfĂŠtemu|dĂŠfĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:dĂŠfĂŠteya|dĂŠfĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidĂŠfĂŠterom|gokidĂŠfĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidĂŠfĂŠtemu|gokidĂŠfĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokidĂŠfĂŠteya|gokidĂŠfĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:daffafte|daffafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:daffaftesher|daffaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:daffaftesherĂ«m|daffaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:daffaftero|daffaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:daffafteshĂ«|daffafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:daffafteshĂ«m|daffafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidaffaftero|gokidaffaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokidaffafteshĂ«|gokidaffafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidaffafteshĂ«m|gokidaffafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:godaffafnkerom|godaffafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godaffafnkeshĂ«|godaffafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godaffafnkeshĂ«m|godaffafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:godaffafnkeya|godaffafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:daffafterom|daffafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:daffaftemu|daffaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:daffafteya|daffafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidaffafterom|gokidaffafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidaffaftemu|gokidaffaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokidaffafteya|gokidaffafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
